name: Hawaiian Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together 3 cups flour, potato flakes, sugar, salt, ginger, and yeast.
2. In another bowl, heat milk, water, and olive oil to 120 degrees Fahrenheit. Stir in the dry ingredients and beat on low speed for 4 minutes.
3. Add pineapple juice, eggs, and vanilla, then mix until a dough forms that leaves the side of the bowl when you lift it up.
4. Knead the dough, adding more flour as needed. Place in a greased bowl and let rise until doubled in size, about 1 1/2 hours.
5. Divide into three loaves. Place them in round greased pie pans (deep) and let rise again until doubled.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes.
